headline: BUILD
BEAUTY
WITH
PURPOSE.
hero.subheadline: Join a team that puts quality first — in every formula, partnership, and shelf.
hero.body: We are growing across marketing, sales, operations, and product. Explore open roles and internship opportunities below.

items.title: Meaningful work
items.description: Help shape a Filipino beauty brand trusted in salons and stores nationwide — work that shows up in real products and real partnerships.

items.title: Room to grow
items.description: Clear paths across functions, mentorship from experienced leaders, and exposure to every stage of the product lifecycle.

items.title: Standards that matter
items.description: We invest in people the same way we invest in formulations — with consistency, care, and respect for craft.

jobs.title: Open positions
jobs.description: Current full-time opportunities across our teams. Search by role, filter by team, and switch between grid or list view.
jobs.emptyMessage: No roles match your search. Try a different keyword or team filter.

banner.headline: Grow with a brand built on consistency
banner.subline: Full-time roles across marketing, sales, operations, and digital — where quality standards guide every team.

internships.title: Internship program
internships.description: Hands-on experience for students and early-career talent. Search by program, filter by team, and switch between grid or list view.
internships.emptyMessage: No programs match your search. Try a different keyword or team filter.

banner.headline: Learn the industry from the inside
banner.subline: Structured internships across marketing, product, sales, and operations — real projects, real mentorship.

cta.title: Don't see the right role?
cta.description: We welcome general applications from people who share our standards. Tell us how you'd like to contribute.

listFilters.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, team, or location
